title: The spread of the revolt to Mecca under Husayn b. Hasan al-Aftas
description: The spread of the revolt to Mecca under Husayn b. Hasan al-Aftas. Recorded under the year 198 AH (814–815 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
